records.name: ContextMenuContext
records.signature: ContextMenuContext(bool IsOpen, double X, double Y, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<(double, double)> SetPosition)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
Right click here
Back Forward Reload Save As... Print

examples.title: File Actions
examples.code:
document.pdf
Right click for options
 Open Duplicate Move to... Add to Favorites Delete

parameters.name: LongPressMs
parameters.description: Duration in milliseconds a touch must remain on the trigger (without significant movement) before the context menu opens. Default: 500ms.

parameters.name: MoveTolerancePx
parameters.description: Pixel threshold for touch movement that cancels the long-press timer. Above this, the user is interpreted as scrolling, not long-pressing.

mdSummary:
# ContextMenu

Right-click menu tied to a container element.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/context-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ContextMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenu | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| ContextMenu | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| ContextMenu | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| ContextMenu | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| ContextMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuCheckboxItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuCheckboxItem | Checked | `bool` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuCheckboxItem | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuCheckboxItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuCheckboxItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuContent | Context | `ContextMenu.ContextMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| ContextMenuContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | Context | `ContextMenu.ContextMenuContext?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioGroup | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioItem | Context | `ContextMenuRadioGroup.ContextMenuRadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuRadioItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuTrigger | Context | `ContextMenu.ContextMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| ContextMenuTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ContextMenuTrigger | LongPressMs | `int` | `500` | Duration in milliseconds a touch must remain on the trigger (without significant movement) before the context menu opens. Default: 500ms. |
| ContextMenuTrigger | MoveTolerancePx | `double` | `10.0` | Pixel threshold for touch movement that cancels the long-press timer. Above this, the user is interpreted as scrolling, not long-pressing. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuCheckboxItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuGroup) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuLabel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuRadioGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuRadioItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ContextMenuTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `ContextMenuCheckboxItem`, `ContextMenuContent`, `ContextMenuGroup`, `ContextMenuItem`, `ContextMenuLabel`, `ContextMenuRadioGroup`, `ContextMenuRadioItem`, `ContextMenuSeparator`, `ContextMenuTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`ContextMenu.ContextMenuContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ContextMenu` — HandleKeyDown handles ContextMenu in ContextMenuTrigger.razor
- `F10` — HandleKeyDown handles F10 in ContextMenuTrigger.razor

## Example
```razor
<ContextMenu />
```
